title: Fish eDNA: DNA extraction from water samples filtered through Sterivex filter unit and preserved in buffer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aksuq","text":"The  objective of this protocol is DNA extraction from water samples filtered through 0.45 µm Sterivex™ filter units and preserved in 2  mL of buffer (dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.br5rm856). ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":151,"length":41}],"data":{}},{"key":"98jne","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ek4et","text":"Extraction is performed using NucleoSpin® Soil kit (MACHEREY-NAGEL) with specific modifications adapted to DNA extraction from Sterivex™ filter units.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2p30f","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qk43","text":"This protocol is used upstream to molecular biology analysis (e.g. qPCR, metabarcoding, ddPCR) to specifically target fish eDNA.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"4FCC65C5B48011EB8CC70A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.br5rm856"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"796k6","text":" The following precautions must be applied :","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5iov8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bkria","text":"    -    Wear gloves throughout the extraction process","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84q6u","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2kg6","text":"    -    Clean the bench with DNA-off solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e6esd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39rv8","text":"    -    Use tips with filters to avoid contaminations","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9q4r3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dgna","text":"    -    All steps have to be performed under a specific DNA-work station (sterile area equipped with air filtration and UV systems). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":9,"length":125}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8t4ad","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6jmlh","text":"Material preparation : ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fc7o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3d0ag","text":"    -    Clean a specific DNA work station and apply UV for 15min","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9rtl3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7mc3b","text":"    -    Turn on the incubator at +37°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eh7fj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7almh","text":"Solutions preparation : ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dc2mf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ar0h","text":"    -    Check buffer SW2  - before the first utilisation, you need to add the indicate volume of ethanol (96 - 100%) to buffer SW2 concentrate and mark the label of the bottle to indicate that ethanol was added. This solution is stable at room temperature (18 - 25°C) for at least one year","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a5m99","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hvg1","text":"    -    Check  absence of precipitate in SDS 20%. Dissolve any precipitate by incubating the solution at 30-40°C for 5-10 min and shaking solution every 2 min.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39c3s","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9v8sd","text":"Samples ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eq5et","text":"    -    Sterivex cartridge filled with 2mL of buffer and stored at -20°C or 4°C (dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.br5rm856)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":82,"length":41}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":82,"length":41}],"data":{}},{"key":"5ak60","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"drpmb","text":"Reagents ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dlqbt","text":"    -    NucleoSpin® Soil kit (MACHEREY-NAGEL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"327rp","text":"    -    Ethanol (96 - 100%), molecular grade to prepare buffer SW2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5loed","text":"    -    Lysozyme solution (add 2 mg lysozyme to 40 μL of Lysis Buffer): 40 µL per sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8eg3s","text":"    -    Proteinase K solution (20 mg/mL): 50 µL per sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1rqtd","text":"    -    20% SDS: 100 µL per sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c96f8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9sk3v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"oub1","text":"Materials ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c7npc","text":"    -    Specific DNA-work station (sterile area equipped with air filtration and UV systems)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"868dv","text":"    -    Microcentrifuge for 1.5 to 2 mL tubes (relative centrifugal force needed :11,000 x g)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9h9qt","text":"    -    Incubator (37°C and 55°C)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1a3nq","text":"    -    Tube Rotator with holder for 15mL tubes or Sterivex","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71dnm","text":"    -    Pipettes : 1000 µL  - 100 µL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ooi9","text":"    -    2 trash cans : 1 for liquid and 1 for solid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2t6im","text":"    -   Vortex  with holder for 15 mL tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d0cht","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9677t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ugub","text":"Consumables","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5hkc7","text":"    -    Tips with filter : 1000µL - 100µL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6nuqb","text":"    -    Sterile 10 mL or 5 mL syringe (1 per sample)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1u60c","text":"    -    2 mL sterile microcentrifuge tubes (about 6 tubes are required per sample)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"11ppe","text":"    -    1.5 sterile microcentrifuge tube to collect DNA at the end of extraction (1 per sample )","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71j4b","text":"    -    Gloves","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"02B33253B48311EB8CC70A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.br5rm856"}}}}
steps: Note : If the samples have been stored at RT or at 4°C, proceed directly to step 2. If the samples have been frozen, proceed to step 1. Take the Sterivex™ filter unit stored at -20 °C after sampling, filtration and preservation with Buffer. Defrost the sample at 4 °C (about 00:30:00 ) Note : during this step heat the incubator at 37 °C

Fix the Sterivex cartriges on the vortex and vortex for 00:05:00 to remove particles from the filter Remove the Inlet Cap (Figure 1) and with a pipette tip, add 40 µL of lysozyme solution into the Sterivex already filled with 2mL of buffer. Insert pipette completely into the inlet to see the pipette tip inside the unit just above the membrane. Re-cap the Sterivex. Figure 1: Position of the two tips of the Sterivex™ filter unit Rotate for 00:45:00 at 37 °C (during this step, place the SDS solution in the incubator for the next step) Remove the Inlet Cap and and with a pipette tip, add 50 µL of Proteinase K solution and 100 µL of SDS 20% . Re-cap the Sterivex. Note : during this step heat the incubator at 55 °C Incubate for 02:00:00 at 55 °C with agitation (or shake manually every 15 min). Remove the Inlet Cap and fix a sterile syringe to the Sterivex. Aspirate the liquid contained in the Sterivex with the syringe by moving back and forth to collect all the liquid Transfer the lysate into two 2 mL tubes (about 1.1 mL per tube). Note : after this step, place the Buffer SE in the incubator heated at 55 °C to anticipate the elution step
In both 2mL tubes, add 200 µL of buffer SL3 . Vortex for 00:00:02 Incubate for 00:05:00 at 4 °C, in a fridge Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

Place a NucleoSpin® Inhibitor Removal Column (red ring) in a collection Tube (2 mL, lid). Load up to 650 µL of clear supernatant (obtained at the step 3) onto the filter. Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 1 minute Remove the column and close the tube containing the flow through. Repeat these steps as many time as there is still some supernatant from step 3 to be filtered. For each centrifugation, collect the supernatant in a clean tube (about 4 tubes are required, but only 1 column for the filtration of all lysate from step 3). Discard the NucleoSpin® Inhibitor Removal Column. Note: If a pellet is visible after the centrifugation, transfer the clear supernatant to a new collection tube (not provided in the kit) to get rid of this pellet, and continue with the clear supernatant.
Add 250 µL of Buffer SB per 2mL tube. Note : 0.38V of buffer SB for 1V of flow through from step 4. Close the lid. Vortex for 00:00:05 and centrifuge briefly.

Place a NucleoSpin® Soil Column (green ring) in a Collection tube (2 mL). Load 650 µL of sample from step 5 onto the column. Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 1 minute Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube. Repeat the three previous steps with all the tubes from step 5 and using the same column. Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube.
Note : the same collection tube is used throughout the entire washing procedure to reduce plastic waste.
1 st wash : Add 500 µL of Buffer SB to the NucleoSpin® Soil Column. Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 30 seconds Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube.
2 nd Wash : Add 550 µL of Buffer SW1 to the NucleoSpin® Soil Column. Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 30 seconds Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube.

3 rd Wash : Add 650 µL of Buffer SW2 to the NucleoSpin® Soil Column. Vortex 00:00:02 and centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube.

4 th Wash : Add 650 µL of Buffer SW2 to the NucleoSpin® Soil Column. Vortex 00:00:02 and centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flow through and place the column back into the collection tube.

Centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 2 minutes . Note: if for any reason, the liquid in the collection tube touched the NucleoSpin® Soil Column after the drying step, discard flow through and centrifuge again.

Place the NucleoSpin® Soil Column into a new 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube. Add 30 µL of Buffer SE previously heated to 55°C into the column. Note: a larger volume of SE buffer can be used but the DNA concentration will be lower Do not close the lid and incubate for 00:01:30 at Room temperature (18-25°C). Close the lid and centrifuge at 11000 x g, °C, 30 seconds Throw the column and keep the tube containing the DNA. Note: A second elution can be performed with the same column to collect more DNA (the concentration will be lower for the second elution) We recommend storing DNA frozen at -20°C until the use of the DNA sample (or at -40°C to -80°C for longer storage).
creator: Cecile Chardon
